prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Frontier-orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO gap, eV
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard`  → B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI density fitting (PySCF)
Geometry: fixed single-point on the user-supplied pyridine geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz (no re-optimization)
Environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation)
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software: chemkit v0.3.0 backend PySCF 22.1 (DFT RKS module)
SCF convergence: converged in 10 cycles (scf_converged = true)
Warnings: no warnings reported by engine

Headline result (Koopmans-style orbital gap)
HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV
  HOMO energy = −7.2525992 eV  (index 20)
  LUMO energy = −1.112786 eV   (index 21)

Reproducibility
• Command executed:  
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpxq5babne/live.json
• Live engine log (streamed during run):  
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpxq5babne/frontier_<timestamp>.out  (available for inspection; contains full SCF and timing details)
• Result JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpxq5babne/live.json

No warnings were produced; integrity.checks report status "ok" with trustworthy = true. All numbers above are direct from the tool output; no rounding applied.
